description: The Capriati clan is a criminal organization originating from Bari, Italy, active since the 1980s. Founded by Antonio Capriati, it is primarily involved in extortion and drug trafficking, operating mainly in the historic center of Bari. The clan has attempted to expand into other areas and infiltrate the economic fabric of the city. In 2023, a major operation dismantled its hierarchical structure, leading to numerous arrests.

country_links.evidence_quote: The confiscated assets include two luxury apartments in London
country_links.context: The clan's cashier had assets confiscated including two luxury apartments in London, indicating the clan's assets are held there.
